keyEvents.text: Goal!  Bahamas 0, Antigua and Barbuda 1. Javorn Stevens (Antigua and Barbuda) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Josh Parker with a cross.
Goal!  Bahamas 0, Antigua and Barbuda 2. Javorn Stevens (Antigua and Barbuda) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Dion Pereira with a through ball.
Quinton Griffith (Antigua and Barbuda) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Bahamas 0, Antigua and Barbuda 3. TJ Bramble (Antigua and Barbuda) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner.
Substitution, Bahamas. Nathan Wells replaces Phieron Wilson.
Goal!  Bahamas 1, Antigua and Barbuda 3. Peter Julmis (Bahamas) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Marcel Joseph.
Substitution, Antigua and Barbuda. Shavorn Philip replaces Javorn Stevens.
Substitution, Antigua and Barbuda. Shalon Knight replaces Josh Parker.
Zafique Drew (Antigua and Barbuda) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Bahamas. William Gardiner replaces Alexiou Cartwright.
Substitution, Bahamas. Ricardo McPhee replaces Omari Bain.
Goal!  Bahamas 1, Antigua and Barbuda 4. Quinton Griffith (Antigua and Barbuda) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the top right corner.
Substitution, Antigua and Barbuda. Vashami Allen replaces Kieron Richards because of an injury.
Substitution, Antigua and Barbuda. Tyrique Tonge replaces Dion Pereira.
Substitution, Antigua and Barbuda. Carl Osbourne replaces Raheem Deterville because of an injury.
Substitution, Bahamas. Nicolás López replaces Peter Julmis.

commentary.text: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.
